parameters.query:
-- Find booking by GCal event ID and cancel it
UPDATE bookings 
SET status = 'cancelled', 
    cancelled_at = NOW(), 
    cancellation_reason = 'Event deleted/cancelled in Google Calendar',
    gcal_synced_at = NOW()
WHERE gcal_event_id = $1::text 
RETURNING booking_id, status, customer_id;

-- Find or update booking by event ID
-- First try to find existing booking by event ID
WITH existing AS (
  SELECT booking_id FROM bookings 
  WHERE gcal_event_id = $1::text 
  LIMIT 1
),
-- If not found, try to find by time match
matched AS (
  SELECT booking_id FROM bookings 
  WHERE DATE(start_time) = DATE($2::timestamp)
    AND EXTRACT(HOUR FROM start_time) = EXTRACT(HOUR FROM $2::timestamp)
    AND provider_id = (SELECT provider_id FROM services WHERE service_id = 1) -- Default provider
  LIMIT 1
)
SELECT COALESCE(
  (SELECT booking_id FROM existing),
  (SELECT booking_id FROM matched)
) as booking_id;

-- Update existing booking with GCal event ID and sync timestamp
UPDATE bookings 
SET gcal_event_id = $1::text,
    gcal_synced_at = NOW(),
    status = CASE WHEN status != 'cancelled' THEN 'confirmed' ELSE status END
WHERE booking_id = $2::int
RETURNING booking_id, gcal_event_id;

-- Log sync operation
INSERT INTO system_logs (workflow_name, execution_id, level, message, details) 
VALUES ($1::text, $2::text, 'INFO', $3::text, $4::jsonb) 
RETURNING id;
